subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances, in this world of existence human souls are diverse and manifold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب من نفحات القدس در این عالم کون و ایجاد نفوس انسانی مختلف و متنوع
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
